nasb.text: On garments taken as pledges they stretch out beside every altar, And in the house of their God they drink the wine of those who have been fined.

esv.text: they lay themselves down beside every altar on garments taken in pledge, and in the house of their God they drink the wine of those who have been fined.

cnv.text: 他們在各祭壇旁， 躺臥在別人抵押的衣服上面； 在他們　神的殿中， 飲用拿剝削回來的錢所買的酒。

ccb.text: 在每座祭坛旁边， 他们把穷人典当的衣服铺开，躺在上面， 又在上帝的殿里喝剥削来的酒。
